title: senecio coriaceus
intro: Senecio coriaceus, also known as Rough-leaf Ragwort or Woolly Fireweed, is a perennial plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a bronchodilator and to treat respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Senecio coriaceus is often combined with other plants to create remedies for respiratory issues, and it is also used in some skincare products due to its antimicrobial properties.
